data.name: QuestionAboutUsingFileWithParameters
data.value: Installation has found a file with installation parameters: {0}. Do you want to run a "passive" installation using parameters from this file?

data.name: UnknownCommandLineParameter
data.value: Unknown command line parameter: {0} {1}

data.name: StandardUsageInfo
data.value: Usage: setup.exe [/q] [/? | /update [/ignoreVersion] | /uninstall] /q - Do not show any messages during installation. Default answers will be selected in question dialogs. Use this for automatic installations only. /? - Show this help message /update - Run installation as update (remove the previous version and install a new one). Get parameters from the registry. /ignoreVersion - Update version even if the existing version is bigger or the same as the current one. /uninstall - Run deinstallation in passive mode

data.name: NotDefinedPathToFileWithCryptographicKey
data.value: The path to the file with the encryption key is not defined.

data.name: TestCertificateNameParameterMustBeFilled
data.value: TEST_CERTIFICATE_NAME parameter must be filled because you specified 'Test' value in the CERTIFICATE_TYPE property

data.name: YouShouldSpecifyBothProcdumpParameters
data.value: You must specify both parameters: PROCDUMP_FILE_PATH and PROCDUMP_LOG_FOLDER_PATH.

data.name: NotExistedFolderInProcdumpLogFolderPathParameter
data.value: The folder in the PROCDUMP_LOG_FOLDER_PATH parameter does not exist.

data.name: Error
data.value: Error

data.name: DifferentIdForWebSite
data.value: Web site {0} has id={1}.

data.name: WrongInstallLocationParameterNoRemovingRights
data.value: Parameter 'INSTALL_LOCATION' is wrong. You do not have deletion rights in this folder.

data.name: NotFoundWebSite
data.value: Web site {0} cannot be found.

data.name: Warning
data.value: Warning

data.name: NotExistedCryptKeyFile
data.value: The encryption key file does not exist: {0}

data.name: WrongInstallLocationParameterNoCreationRights
data.value: Parameter 'INSTALL_LOCATION' is wrong. You do not have creation rights in this folder.

data.name: ErrorDuringDecriptAPasswordsFromFileWithParameters
data.value: An error occurred during decryption of a password from the parameters file. Error message: {0}

data.name: ManyCertificatesWithTheCurrentThumprint
data.value: Count of certificates ({0}) with thumbprint '{1}' is wrong. There can be only one certificate with a tumbprint.

data.name: YouMustSpecifyAPathToProcDumpExeFile
data.value: You must specify a path to the ProcDump.exe file in PROCDUMP_FILE_PATH parameter.

data.name: WrongCountOfUpdateParameters
data.value: The update parameter count is wrong.

data.name: NotDefinedPathToFileWithParameters
data.value: The path to the parameter file is not defined.

data.name: Question
data.value: Question

data.name: WrongParameterValueAndAcceptableValue
data.value: {0} has wrong value '{1}' Acceptable values are '{2}'.

data.name: WrongInstallLocationParameterTooShort
data.value: Parameter 'INSTALL_LOCATION' is wrong. It is too short.

data.name: WrongInstallLocationParameterNoDrive
data.value: Parameter 'INSTALL_LOCATION' is wrong. The system has not '{0}' drive

data.name: Information
data.value: Information

data.name: WaitInstallationInProgress
data.value: Wait. Installation in progress...

data.name: InstallationHasFinishedSuccessfully
data.value: Installation has completed successfully

data.name: YouCannotUseBothUpdateAndUninstallParameters
data.value: You cannot use both the 'update' and the 'uninstall' parameters.

data.name: SilentModeForNotInstalledProduct
data.value: You cannot use a silent mode because the product is not installed.

data.name: NoFileWithParameters
data.value: File with parameters '{0}' cannot be found

data.name: bannrbmp
data.value: ..\Resources\bannrbmp.bmp;System.Drawing.Bitmap, System.Drawing, Version=4.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=b03f5f7f11d50a3a

data.name: RemoveProduct
data.value: Remove {0}

data.name: UpdateProduct
data.value: Update {0} (Unattended Mode)

data.name: WarningPreviousVersionIsBiggerThanTheCurentOne
data.value: Warning: the previous version of product is bigger than the current version. Check the box to install the current version whatever

data.name: WarningVersionsAreTheSame
data.value: Warning: The product version you are installing is the same as the version already installed. Check the box to continue the installation anyway

data.name: Next
data.value: Next

data.name: Cancel
data.value: Cancel

data.name: WrongSystemType
data.value: This installation package is not supported by this processor type. Contact your product vendor.

data.name: EmptyDeployLogin
data.value: You must specify a deploy login to continue

data.name: EmptyDeployPassword
data.value: You must specify a deploy password to continue

data.name: CannotEncryptSectionInWebConfigFormat
data.value: Cannot encrypt section '{0}' in web.config

data.name: SelectActionFormTitle
data.value: Select action you want to perform

data.name: CurrentUserCannotAccesssToRemoteServer
data.value: Installation does not have access to '{0}' server, because you have not permissions or the server is unavailable. Stop services manually and try again

data.name: TheCertificateWillExpireSoonFormat
data.value: The certificate will expire during {0} days
